russell-replicant
description=Cybernetic health harness for Linux AI/ML workstations. Russell observes, remembers, and reports through ACP and CLI — Jack the Nurse persona watches over the machine.

replicant.type=health-harness
replicant.platform=linux

visibility.templates=public
